// note: VS Code Copilot MCP config. Pick ONE server entry below (HTTP for a shared deployment, stdio for local-only).

solidigm-brand.// description: Solidigm brand tokens, assets, guidelines, UI toolkit, and SharePoint brand library.

solidigm-brand-local.// description: Run the MCP server locally as a subprocess (requires mcp/.venv activated or system python with requirements installed).

figma.// description: Figma MCP — read-only access to Figma files, variables, and components via personal access token. Start the Figma desktop app first.
